title: Bare Bones X PvP Pack
description: A Simple PvP  Pack for BARE BONES User
body:
Bare Bones X PvP is a simple, performance-friendly PvP pack made specifically for fans of the Bare Bones style — but with a twist.

This pack removes visual noise and focuses on clean visuals, PvP clarity, and competitive advantage. Whether you're grinding ranked matches or chilling in casual fights, this pack gives you better visibility without losing the iconic Bare Bones look.


## Showcase Video

[https://youtu.be/zV5J4WiyayM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zV5J4WiyayM)




Features

Short Swords – Clearer screen, sharper aim

Mini Shield & Totem – Less bulk, more visibility

Low Fire – Fire no longer blocks your view

Smooth Transparent GUI – Clean, subtle, aesthetic

Simple Crosshair – Centered and crisp

No Heart Flashing – No blinking hearts at low HP

No Eating Particles – Cleaner food animations

No Explosion Particles/Sound – Less visual and audio spam

No Potion Effect Particles – Stay focused without distraction

No Block Breaking Particles – Cleaner mining visuals

💡 Why Use This Pack?

No overdone edits or crazy effects — just clean, smooth, competitive visuals

Built on the Bare Bones aesthetic for flat, simple, modern textures

Great for low-end systems, sweaty PvP clients, and performance setups

Lightweight, lag-free, and tournament-friendly

Perfect for Bedwars, UHC, SkyPvP, Bridge, or just vibing with friends.

⚙️ Compatibility

Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.5

Compatible with OptiFine / OptiGUI

Works with most PvP mods and clients

Fully optimized for performance
